highlights.title: Welcome to the Media Center
highlights.description: Download our best images, videos, and fact sheets in high quality for your promotional needs.

factsheets.title: Fact Sheets
factsheets.desc: Detailed PDF guides for every tour

q1.q: How can I use these resources?
q1.a: You are free to use these assets for promoting our experiences on your digital and printed channels.

q2.q: Are the videos and photos copyrighted?
q2.a: Yes, but as an authorized partner/affiliate you have full permission to use them without watermarks.

q3.q: How often is the media updated?
q3.a: We update our Dropbox folders every season with fresh, high-quality content.
